allow: Bash(node -e "const app = require\(''''./src/app''''\); const routes = []; app._router.stack.forEach\(m => { if \(m.name === ''''router'''' && m.handle && m.handle.stack\) { m.handle.stack.forEach\(r => { if \(r.route\) routes.push\(Object.keys\(r.route.methods\)[0].toUpperCase\(\) + '''' '''' + m.regexp.toString\(\).match\(/\\\\/api\\\\/[^\\]+/\)?.[0]\); }\); } }\); console.log\(''''Routes:''''\); routes.forEach\(r => console.log\(''''  '''' + r\)\);")
